libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set `net.sf.ehcache.skipUpdateCheck=true` before creating CacheManager/cache instances, or disable update checks in Ehcache configuration. Use temporary directories for disk-store and persistent-cache tests. If covering Bitronix discovery, create a temporary `bitronix.properties` with JMX disabled and null journal, set `bitronix.tm.configuration` to it during the test, and clear/shutdown Bitronix afterward.

deterministic_setup.reason: ehcache-core declares JTA as provided and transaction/cache APIs reference javax.transaction types; tests covering XA/local transaction behavior need these classes on the test classpath.
DefaultTransactionManagerLookup normally discovers Bitronix; existing meaningful coverage for ehcache transaction-manager lookup uses Bitronix rather than an external service.
Bitronix declares the JMS API as optional, so it is not pulled transitively; adding it avoids missing optional JMS API classes when Bitronix is present.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8877 [Automation] native-image run fails for net.sf.ehcache:ehcache-core:2.5.0; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Ehcache 2.x also contains optional Hibernate, servlet/web, Terracotta, and sizeof-agent integration points; do not add those dependencies unless tests intentionally cover those integrations.
The native-image run failure remains authoritative; these setup entries only make meaningful transaction-oriented coverage reachable.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Ehcache Core 2.5.0 is mostly in-process, so no Docker service is needed, but meaningful coverage of its transaction-related APIs requires provided/optional transaction classes that are not supplied by the base artifact scaffold.
